packageRules.description: Pin @sonicjs-cms/core to the exact beta (3.0.0-beta.24) in cms/. This is deliberate: the CMS Worker tracks a pre-release whose schema/migrations must be re-verified by hand on every bump (see docs/cms.md 'Migrations'). Do NOT let a bot auto-upgrade it. Bump manually + re-run cms/ migrations + typecheck.
